test.create_query: CREATE TABLE composite_key_source_table ( key1 UInt64, key2 String, attr_string String, attr_uint UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (key1, key2);

CREATE DICTIONARY composite_key_dictionary ( key1 UInt64, key2 String, attr_string String, attr_uint UInt64 ) PRIMARY KEY key1, key2 SOURCE(CLICKHOUSE(DB 'default' TABLE 'composite_key_source_table')) LAYOUT(COMPLEX_KEY_HASHED()) LIFETIME(0);

CREATE DICTIONARY inverse_lookup_dictionary ( id UInt64, attr_string String, attr_uint UInt64 ) PRIMARY KEY id SOURCE(CLICKHOUSE(DB 'default' TABLE 'inverse_lookup_source_table')) LAYOUT(HASHED()) LIFETIME(0);
test.query: SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) = '4' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) != '4' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetUInt64('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_uint', key) > 5 FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetUInt64('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_uint', key) <= 5 FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) < '5' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) >= '5' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) > '5' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) <= '5' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetUInt64('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_uint', key) < 4 FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetUInt64('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_uint', key) >= 4 FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) LIKE '5%' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) NOT LIKE '5%' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) IN ('0', '1', '2', '3', '4') FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) NOT IN ('0', '1', '2', '3', '4') FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetUInt64('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_uint', key) IN (0, 1, 2, 3, 4) FORMAT Null;
SELECT key FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetUInt64('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_uint', key) NOT IN (0, 1, 2, 3, 4) FORMAT Null;

SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) IN ('0', '1', '2', '3', '4') AND dictGetUInt64('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_uint', key) < 4 FORMAT Null;

SELECT count() FROM inverse_lookup_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) NOT IN ('0', '1', '2', '3', '4') OR dictGetString('inverse_lookup_dictionary', 'attr_string', key) >= '4' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_string', (key1, key2)) = '4' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_string', (key1, key2)) != '4' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetUInt64('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_uint', (key1, key2)) > 5 FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetUInt64('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_uint', (key1, key2)) <= 5 FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_string', (key1, key2)) < '5' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_string', (key1, key2)) >= '5' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_string', (key1, key2)) LIKE '5%' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_string', (key1, key2)) NOT LIKE '5%' FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_string', (key1, key2)) IN ('0', '1', '2', '3', '4') FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_string', (key1, key2)) NOT IN ('0', '1', '2', '3', '4') FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetUInt64('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_uint', (key1, key2)) IN (0, 1, 2, 3, 4) FORMAT Null;
SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetUInt64('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_uint', (key1, key2)) NOT IN (0, 1, 2, 3, 4) FORMAT Null;

SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_string', (key1, key2)) IN ('0', '1', '2', '3', '4') AND dictGetUInt64('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_uint', (key1, key2)) < 4 FORMAT Null;

SELECT count() FROM composite_key_fact_table WHERE dictGetString('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_string', (key1, key2)) NOT IN ('0', '1', '2', '3', '4') OR dictGetString('composite_key_dictionary', 'attr_string', (key1, key2)) >= '4' FORMAT Null;
